message:
native: buffer round-trip via staging + copyBufferToBuffer

queue.writeBuffer doesn't surface bytes for a combined
MapRead+CopyDst destination on wgpu-native v29 — switched to the
canonical pattern: staging buffer (mappedAtCreation, host writes,
unmap) then copyBufferToBuffer to a MapRead+CopyDst destination,
submit, devicePoll, mapAsync, read back. Verified byte-equal at
256 B and 4 MiB.
